core.description: orchestrator/gates/state-machine/spool dispatch -- rebuilds on any plugkit-core src change

embed-weights.description: BERT embedding model weights, served natively by gm-runner's host_vec_embed; also embedded in the browser/wasm-fallback build variant

note: RESOLVED (treesitter-grammar-runtime-split): plugkit-core no longer statically links any tree-sitter grammar or the tree-sitter core crate. crates/plugkit-core/Cargo.toml carries zero tree-sitter-* dependencies as of this note; code_index.rs::extract_chunks parses exclusively via call_plugin("treesitter", "parse", {lang, source}) over the host_plugin_call wasm-import ABI (see wasm_dispatch/host_abi.rs), the same generic out-of-process-plugin mechanism already proven for libsql/bert. The wasm host (agentplug-runner, both the JS-wrapper loader and the native gm-runner loader) resolves/downloads a standalone treesitter.wasm plugin at ~/.agentplug/plugins/treesitter.wasm and dispatches `parse` for all 18 languages code_index.rs's lang_for_ext maps to (verified live: javascript/typescript/python/rust/go/c/cpp/java/json/html/css/bash/markdown/csharp/haskell/julia/php/powershell/ruby all return {ok:true,nodes:[...]} via `agentplug-runner dispatch treesitter parse`). The entries below now document grammar CONTENT version pins for that external treesitter plugin build (not plugkit-core's own Cargo.toml, which no longer resolves them) -- kept here as the still-useful cross-repo version-pin ledger versus rs-codeinsight's independent 0.24.7-pinned in-process grammar set, updated to reflect the plugin now being the sole consumer on the rs-plugkit side.

tree_sitter_cross_repo_manifest.purpose: Tree-sitter GRAMMAR version pin ledger, historically shared between rs-plugkit (crates/plugkit-core, AST-node-boundary extraction for embedding chunks, code_index.rs) and rs-codeinsight (per-language metrics extraction for conventions/depgraph output, analyzer.rs). Since treesitter-grammar-runtime-split, rs-plugkit no longer resolves any tree-sitter-* crate itself -- code_index.rs delegates parsing entirely to the out-of-process `treesitter` agentplug plugin (~/.agentplug/plugins/treesitter.wasm) over host_plugin_call. The `owner: rs-plugkit` fields below now mean 'grammar+version this repo's runtime dispatch expects the treesitter plugin to resolve', not 'pinned in this repo's own Cargo.toml' -- there is no Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock entry on the rs-plugkit side to drift anymore. rs-codeinsight is unaffected: it still links tree-sitter grammars in-process (its own extraction purpose, still genuinely independent, still NOT a candidate for crate merge).

core_pin_intentionally_diverges.rs-plugkit: no longer applicable -- rs-plugkit has no in-process tree-sitter core dependency; parsing is delegated to the external treesitter plugin, whose own tree-sitter core version is that plugin's concern, not tracked in this repo's Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock
core_pin_intentionally_diverges.reason: Retained for rs-codeinsight, which still links tree-sitter grammars in-process and can genuinely drift core-version-wise from whatever the treesitter plugin build resolves. The API-incompatibility surface named in treesitter-surface-consolidation-version-drift-documented no longer applies symmetrically since only one side (rs-codeinsight) has an in-repo pin left to drift.

shared_grammars.description: Every language grammar rs-plugkit's runtime dispatch (lang_for_ext in code_index.rs) sends to the treesitter plugin, and rs-codeinsight's own in-process pinned version for the same language. `owner: rs-plugkit` = this repo's code_index.rs::lang_for_ext names this language string and expects the treesitter plugin to resolve it (no local crate pin to bump); `owner: rs-codeinsight` = only rs-codeinsight consumes this grammar, in-process, via its own Cargo.toml pin.

codeinsight_only_grammars.description: Languages rs-codeinsight supports via its broader 28-language optional-feature set that rs-plugkit's lang_for_ext does not map at all -- these have no shared-pin obligation, owned solely by rs-codeinsight, listed here only for completeness so a future grammar addition to rs-plugkit's lang_for_ext checks this list first instead of independently picking a version.

tree_sitter_cross_repo_manifest.maintenance_rule: rs-codeinsight bumping a shared grammar's Cargo.toml version: update this manifest in the same commit. rs-plugkit side: a lang_for_ext addition/removal (code_index.rs) or a change in which grammar version the treesitter plugin build resolves updates this manifest instead of a Cargo.toml bump (there is none) -- this file is the check, not a passive record, on both sides.
